steps.title: Parallel lines share the same slope
steps.content: Parallel shortcut: equal slopes. The given line $y = 8x + 2$ has slope $8$, so our line also has slope $8$.

steps.title: Use the given point
steps.content: The line passes through $(0,6)$, so its $y$-intercept is $6$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Slope $8$ and $y$-intercept $6$ give $y=8x+6$. That matches Choice B — $y=8x+6$.
